<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\HttpKernel\CacheClearer; /** * ChainCacheClearer. * * @author Dustin Dobervich <ddobervich@gmail.com> * * @final */ class ChainCacheClearer implements CacheClearerInterface { /** * @param iterable<mixed, CacheClearerInterface> $clearers */ public function __construct( private iterable $clearers = [], ) { } public function clear(string $cacheDir): void { foreach ($this->clearers as $clearer) { $clearer->clear($cacheDir); } } }
